Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Good work, Commander. Now that you have drawn out the range from which we can launch attacks using the SS-N-3 missile, ensure both of your units are moving towards the circle.

When both units come into range of the outside of the circle, begin firing your missiles in salvos at the American targets. Note that you can right click on the SS-N-3 icon in the bottom bar to select salvo size. Ensure the K-175 is surfaced before beginning your attack!
